stripe_clockshark.mrr_daily_by_customer.description: Shows the daily recurring revenue (MRR) amount in USD for each customer. Use this to track individual customer revenue trends over time.

stripe_clockshark.mrr_daily_by_customer_.description: Shows the daily recurring revenue (MRR) in USD broken down by both customer and product. Use this to understand which products each customer is subscribed to and their revenue contribution.

stripe_clockshark.mrr_daily_by_product.description: Shows the daily recurring revenue (MRR) in USD for each product across all customers. Use this to analyze product-level revenue performance and trends.

stripe_clockshark.mrr_monthly_dynamics.description: Shows monthly changes in recurring revenue including new revenue, expansions, contractions, and churn, along with subscriber counts. Use this for high-level revenue growth analysis and understanding what drives month-over-month changes.

stripe_clockshark.mrr_monthly_dynamics_b.description: Shows monthly revenue changes (new, expansion, contraction, churn) and subscriber counts for each individual customer. Use this to analyze customer-level revenue behavior and identify high-growth or at-risk accounts.

Tracks monthly recurring revenue (MRR) changes for each product, showing how revenue grows or shrinks through new customers, upgrades, downgrades, and cancellations. Provides a complete view of subscription revenue movement from month to month.

SF_Simpro.sf_account.description: Contains customer and prospect company records with contact details, account classification, ownership, and engagement tracking. This is the master list of all business accounts in the CRM system.

SF_Simpro.sf_intacct_contract_line_produ.description: Details individual product line items within customer contracts, including pricing, quantities, contract terms, and annual recurring revenue calculations. Shows what specific products and services each customer is contracted for.

SF_Simpro.sf_lead.description: Tracks potential customer leads from initial capture through conversion to opportunities or accounts, including lead source, status, and assignment information. This is the current state of all active and historical leads.

SF_Simpro.sf_lead_history.description: Historical snapshot of lead records showing how lead information and status changed over time. Maintains a complete audit trail of all lead modifications and progression.

SF_Simpro.sf_opportunity.description: Contains current sales opportunities including deal stages, amounts, forecasts, account details, and revenue metrics like MRR and subscription amounts. This is the primary table for tracking active and historical sales deals and their associated financial data.

SF_Simpro.sf_opportunity_history.description: Historical snapshot of sales opportunities showing how deal attributes changed over time including stage transitions, amount changes, and ownership updates. Use this table to analyze opportunity progression and historical deal performance.

SF_Simpro.sf_opportunity_line_item.description: Individual products and line items within each sales opportunity, showing quantities, product details, and MRR amounts for each item sold. This table breaks down what specific products or services are included in each deal.

SF_Simpro.sp_daily_account_arr.description: Daily snapshots of Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) by customer account, tracking changes from new business, expansions, reductions, and churn. This table provides a day-by-day view of revenue movements at the account level.

SF_Simpro.sp_daily_account_product_arr.description: Daily product-level ARR metrics by customer account showing license counts, pricing, and revenue changes for each product. This granular view helps analyze which products are driving revenue growth or contraction at each account.

SF_Simpro.sp_daily_product_arr.description: Daily tracking of Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) changes by product, showing how revenue grows or shrinks through new sales, expansions, reductions, and cancellations. Provides day-by-day visibility into product performance and revenue movements.

SF_Simpro.sp_monthly_account_arr.description: Monthly summary of Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) for each customer account, including territory, ownership, and how revenue changed through new business, expansions, reductions, and lost customers. Helps track account health and revenue trends by customer.

SF_Simpro.sp_monthly_account_product_arr.description: Detailed monthly view combining customer accounts with specific products they purchase, including licenses, pricing, and ARR movements like cross-sells, upsells, and price changes. Enables deep analysis of what products each customer buys and how their spending evolves.

SF_Simpro.sp_monthly_product_arr.description: Monthly rollup of Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) at the product level, aggregating all customers to show total revenue performance by product family and individual products. Used for product portfolio analysis and strategic planning.

SF_Simpro.Day1_Targets_Daily.description: Daily sales funnel targets and actuals tracking leads, opportunities, and conversions through each stage from initial contact to closed deal. Measures sales team performance against goals for pipeline generation and conversion rates.

SF_Simpro.Day1_Targets_Daily_Strategic_T.description: Daily sales and marketing targets by strategic territory, including planned metrics for leads, marketing qualified leads, sales qualified opportunities, pipeline value, and closed-won revenue. Used for tracking performance goals across different geographic or market segments.

SF_Simpro.Day1_Targets_Daily_ext.description: Extended daily sales metrics showing conversion rates through the sales funnel, breaking down performance by lead source, role, and whether opportunities were inbound or outbound. Tracks progression from leads through to closed-won deals with associated revenue.

SF_Simpro.day1_targets.description: Stores sales and marketing targets organized by time period (year, quarter, month) and company, tracking key performance indicators across the sales funnel from leads to closed-won deals. Includes metrics for lead generation, conversion stages, and revenue targets.

SF_Simpro.day1_targets_ext.description: Extended version of sales and marketing targets with additional dimensions including role type, lead source category, and inbound/outbound classification. Provides more granular target segmentation for sales pipeline and conversion metrics.

SF_Simpro.day1_targets_strategic_territo.description: Territory-based sales and marketing targets focused on strategic accounts, showing planned metrics for lead generation, pipeline value, and closed-won revenue by geographic or account territory. Tracks targets in USD for key sales stages.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_Actual.description: Comprehensive actual performance metrics for revenue operations tracking the complete sales funnel from leads through closed deals. Includes detailed attribution by sales rep, lead source, territory, and account type with revenue amounts, deal counts, and conversion metrics across multiple time zones.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_Actual_All_Date.description: Comprehensive revenue operations metrics tracking leads, opportunities, pipeline, and closed deals across all dates with detailed attribution by source, owner, and account characteristics. Includes MRR amounts, partner deals, big deals, and conversion counts at each funnel stage.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_Actual_by_Creat.description: Revenue operations metrics organized by the date opportunities and leads were created, showing funnel performance from lead generation through closed deals. Focuses on creation date analysis for pipeline development and conversion tracking.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_BigDeal_All_Dat.description: Detailed tracking of large revenue opportunities (big deals) with event-level data linking leads to converted opportunities. Captures deal size, MRR values, and lead source attribution for high-value transactions.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_Plan_vs_Actual.description: Monthly comparison of planned revenue targets against actual performance across the full sales funnel from leads to closed deals. Enables variance analysis and forecast accuracy assessment for revenue operations.

SF_Simpro.RevOps_Metrics_Plan_vs_Actual_.description: Daily granular view of planned versus actual revenue metrics across the sales funnel, including leads, pipeline, and MRR. Provides day-level tracking for real-time performance monitoring and trend analysis.

Daily tracking of revenue operations metrics comparing planned versus actual performance across different roles, including leads, opportunities, pipeline, and revenue figures. Captures key sales funnel metrics like MQLs, SQLs, SQOs, closed won deals, and MRR by role and time period.

Reshaped version of role-based revenue metrics where individual measures (leads, MRR, pipeline, etc.) are pivoted into rows for easier analysis and reporting. Same data as the role table but in a transposed format for different analytical needs.

Daily revenue operations metrics broken down by lead source category and inbound/outbound channels, showing planned versus actual performance across the sales funnel including pipeline value, closed deals, MRR, and sales cycle time. Includes both standard and annual contract metrics for comprehensive revenue analysis.

Fiscal year 2025 specific version of revenue metrics by lead source category and channel type, tracking planned versus actual performance for leads, opportunities, pipeline, and revenue. Filtered dataset focusing on FY2025 performance with the same comprehensive metrics as the main source category table.

Daily revenue operations metrics organized by strategic territory, comparing planned targets against actual results for key sales funnel stages and revenue outcomes. Provides territory-level visibility into leads, marketing/sales qualified leads, opportunities, pipeline value, closed won deals, and monthly recurring revenue.

Daily tracking of revenue operations metrics comparing planned targets versus actual performance for strategic accounts, including leads, pipeline, and monthly recurring revenue. This table helps monitor sales performance and forecast accuracy on a day-by-day basis for key accounts.

Revenue operations metrics broken down by role, comparing planned targets against actual results for leads, opportunities, and revenue. This table enables analysis of sales team performance by individual roles and responsibilities.

Revenue operations metrics organized by lead source category and inbound/outbound classification, tracking planned versus actual performance across the sales funnel. This table helps identify which marketing and sales channels are most effective at generating revenue.

SF_Simpro.int_accounts.description: Master account information including customer details, account status, subscription values, and sales ownership. This is the central table for understanding customer accounts, their tier level, revenue contribution, and account management assignments.

SF_Simpro.mrr_daily_by_customer_contract.description: Daily snapshot of monthly recurring revenue (MRR) broken down by customer, contract, and product with multi-currency support. This table provides detailed visibility into revenue streams at the most granular level for financial analysis and reporting.

SF_Simpro.mrr_monthly_dynamics_by_custom.description: Tracks monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and annual recurring revenue (ARR) changes for each customer, showing starting balances, ending balances, new revenue, additions, reductions, and churn across multiple currencies. This BigQuery version provides a comprehensive view of revenue movements throughout each month.

Tracks monthly recurring revenue (MRR) and annual recurring revenue (ARR) changes for each customer, showing starting balances, ending balances, new revenue, additions, reductions, and churn across multiple currencies. This Salesforce version provides a comprehensive view of revenue movements throughout each month.

SF_Simpro.pre_rev_cloud_closed_opps.description: Contains details of closed cloud-related sales opportunities including product information, pricing, MRR amounts, account details, and opportunity ownership. Useful for analyzing won deals, revenue attribution, and sales performance.

sp_group.absence_data.description: Records employee absence information including the type of absence, dates, and associated manager details. Helps track attendance patterns and manage workforce availability.

sp_group.account_managers_talk_time.description: Captures account manager call activity including dial attempts, call durations, connection rates, and conversation quality metrics. Provides insights into sales team productivity and customer engagement effectiveness.

sp_group.bigchange_aroflo_payment_metric.description: Weekly payment processing metrics for BigChange and AroFlo products, tracking connected accounts, transaction volume, and revenue performance by business unit.

sp_group.case.description: Comprehensive customer support case tracking system containing all support tickets, issues, resolutions, and customer interactions across products and services.

sp_group.cross_sell_upsell_opportunity.description: Sales opportunities focused on selling additional products or upgrades to existing customers, including revenue details, owner information, and opportunity status.

sp_group.group_cro_scorecard.description: Executive-level sales performance scorecard tracking monthly revenue metrics, pipeline health, win rates, and performance against plan across brands and regions.

sp_group.group_daily_source_cat.description: Daily sales and marketing funnel metrics tracking leads, opportunities, and revenue from acquisition through close, segmented by source, region, and deal type.

sp_group.group_sales_opportunity.description: Tracks sales opportunities across the organization including pipeline stages, deal values, account information, and team member assignments. Records each potential sale from initial SQL creation through to won or lost status.

sp_group.monthly_business_review.description: Contains monthly performance metrics comparing actual results against plan and prior year across different regions, brands, and companies. Used for business review meetings and performance tracking.

sp_group.payment_goals_weekly.description: Tracks weekly and monthly payment processing goals and actuals including total payment volume (TPV), activations, and connections by business unit. Shows progress toward targets and completion status.

sp_group.simpro_payment_activations_appr.description: Summarizes monthly payment account activations and approvals by country, showing both new activations and cumulative totals over time. Provides high-level metrics on payment onboarding growth.

sp_group.simpro_payment_metrics.description: Detailed payment transaction and account data including Stripe connected accounts, transaction volumes, revenue, and payment status tracking. Links Salesforce records with payment processing activity and lifetime values.

sp_group.weekly_business_review.description: Weekly performance metrics showing actual versus planned results across different sales regions, brands, and companies, with month-to-date, quarter-to-date, year-to-date, and prior year comparisons. Used for tracking business performance against targets on a weekly basis.

af_aroflo.Day1_Targets.description: Sales and marketing targets for lead generation, pipeline development, and revenue goals organized by time period, company, and lead source. Tracks conversion rates and financial metrics like MRR and average deal size for performance planning.

af_aroflo.Day1_Targets_Daily_ext.description: Daily-level sales and marketing targets showing lead funnel goals, pipeline amounts, and revenue metrics by company and lead source. Provides granular daily targets for tracking sales performance against goals.

af_aroflo.RevOps_Metrics_Actual_AroFlo.description: Actual revenue operations performance data tracking leads, opportunities, pipeline, and closed deals with detailed attribution by sales rep, lead source, and territory. Includes financial metrics like MRR, deal sizes, and win/loss counts for sales performance analysis.

af_aroflo.RevOps_Metrics_Actual_AroFlo_A.description: Comprehensive revenue operations actuals across all dates with lead funnel metrics, pipeline values, closed deals, and revenue figures broken down by sales team, lead source, and deal characteristics. Enables historical sales performance analysis and trending.

af_aroflo.RevOps_Metrics_AroFlo_Plan_vs_.description: Tracks revenue operations performance metrics for AroFlo, comparing planned targets against actual results across the sales funnel from leads to closed deals and monthly recurring revenue (MRR). Includes breakdowns by time period, company, opportunity type, and special categories like partner deals and big deals.

Provides daily-level revenue operations metrics for AroFlo with additional detail on lead source categories and inbound/outbound channels, allowing analysis of which marketing and sales channels are driving performance against plan. Complements the summary metrics table with more granular tracking by date and source.

af_aroflo.aroflo_churn_report.description: Contains customer cancellation and churn data for AroFlo, capturing reasons for cancellation, competitor movements, client characteristics, billing information, and account history to analyze why customers leave. Essential for understanding retention challenges and reducing customer attrition.

af_aroflo.aroflo_combined_opportunities.description: Consolidates sales opportunity data across AroFlo pipelines, tracking deals from creation through close with details on deal characteristics, owners, lead sources, stages, and revenue amounts. Used for comprehensive sales pipeline analysis and forecasting.

af_aroflo.aroflo_csm_opp_combined.description: Tracks customer success and account management opportunities for AroFlo, including expansion deals, renewals, and other post-sale revenue opportunities with ownership assignments and contract details. Focuses on existing customer growth and retention revenue.

af_aroflo.aroflo_cw_report.description: Tracks closed-won sales opportunities for Aroflo, including deal values, contract terms, and monthly recurring revenue. Use this to analyze successful sales conversions and revenue performance.

af_aroflo.aroflo_top_of_funnel.description: Captures early-stage marketing and sales leads for Aroflo, tracking lead sources, marketing campaigns, and lead qualification status. Use this to understand where prospects are coming from and how they enter the sales pipeline.

af_aroflo.group_opp_aroflo.description: Comprehensive sales opportunity data for Aroflo combining account details, pipeline stages, forecasts, and outcomes. Use this to analyze the complete sales journey from SQL to closed deals across all opportunities.

bigchange.bc_annual_recurring_revenue.description: Monthly tracking of annual recurring revenue (ARR) for BigChange customers, showing new revenue, expansions, contractions, and churn over time. Use this to analyze revenue growth trends and customer account changes.

bigchange.bc_contracted_annual_recurring.description: Monthly contracted annual recurring revenue (CARR) for BigChange customers, reflecting committed future revenue based on active contracts. Use this to forecast and understand contracted revenue commitments versus actual ARR.

bigchange.bc_funnel_metrics_plan_vs_actu.description: Daily sales funnel performance tracking that compares planned targets against actual results across all stages from leads to closed deals, including revenue metrics and partner performance. Helps sales and marketing teams monitor daily progress toward goals and identify performance gaps.

Monthly aggregated sales funnel metrics comparing planned targets to actual performance across the customer journey from leads through closed deals, with revenue and partner tracking. Provides month-over-month visibility into sales and marketing effectiveness.

bigchange.bc_product_annual_recurring_re.description: Annual recurring revenue (ARR) broken down by product category and customer contact over time. Enables product performance analysis and customer revenue contribution tracking.

bigchange.contracts.description: Comprehensive contract records including terms, values, dates, customer information, and sales attribution for all customer agreements. Central repository for contract management and revenue recognition.

bigchange.hubspot_deals.description: Sales opportunities tracked in HubSpot CRM including deal values, stages, close dates, and ownership information. Provides real-time visibility into the active sales pipeline and forecasted revenue.

bigchange.leads.description: Contains information about potential customers who have expressed interest in products or services, including their contact details and how they found the company. Tracks lead origin and assignment to sales opportunities.

bigchange.line_items.description: Stores individual product or service items on invoices and contracts, including pricing, quantities, and billing periods. Used for tracking recurring revenue and invoice details.

bigchange.market_qualified_leads.description: Tracks leads that have been qualified by marketing as having genuine interest and meeting basic criteria, including website interaction details and form submissions. Indicates whether leads are good or bad fit for sales follow-up.

bigchange.sales_metrics.description: Comprehensive sales performance data tracking the entire sales process from initial meeting through closed deals, including opportunity values, team assignments, and win/loss outcomes. Contains monthly recurring revenue and contract details for analysis.

clockshark.cs_funnel_metrics_plan_vs_act.description: Daily comparison of planned versus actual performance across the entire sales and marketing funnel, from leads through closed revenue. Tracks key metrics including MQLs, SQLs, opportunities, closed deals, and MRR against targets.

clockshark.cs_sales_opportunities.description: Tracks sales deals and opportunities through the pipeline, including deal stages, ownership, lead sources, and outcomes (won/lost amounts). Contains company information and sales team assignments for each opportunity.
